title: Carbon dioxide emissions per capita
description: Carbon dioxide emissions are those stemming from the burning of fossil fuels and the manufacture of cement, expressed in metric tons per person.
methodology: Estimated from national energy statistics using emission factors for each fuel type, then divided by mid-year population.

title: Per capita CO2 emissions
description: Total carbon dioxide emissions from fossil fuel combustion and industrial processes divided by population, in tonnes per person.
methodology: Compiled from energy balances and apparent fossil fuel consumption, with population denominators from national censuses.

title: Methane emissions from agriculture
description: Methane emissions from enteric fermentation, manure management, and rice cultivation, measured in kilotonnes of CO2 equivalent.
methodology: Activity data on livestock and crop areas combined with IPCC tier-1 emission factors.

title: Adult literacy rate
description: The percentage of people aged 15 and above who can read and write a short simple statement about their everyday life.
methodology: Derived from national household surveys and censuses; self-declared and tested literacy are pooled where available.

title: Youth literacy rate
description: The percentage of people aged 15 to 24 who can both read and write a short simple statement on their everyday life.
methodology: Estimated from household surveys and population censuses, restricted to the 15-24 age band.

title: Life expectancy at birth
description: The number of years a newborn would live if prevailing patterns of mortality at the time of birth stayed the same throughout life.
methodology: Computed from period life tables built on registered deaths and population estimates by single year of age.

title: Infant mortality rate
description: The number of infants dying before reaching one year of age, per 1,000 live births in a given year.
methodology: Estimated from vital registration where complete, otherwise modeled from survey data such as DHS and MICS.

source.organization: UN Inter-agency Group for Child Mortality Estimation

title: Gross domestic product per capita
description: Gross domestic product divided by mid-year population, expressed in constant international dollars at purchasing power parity.
methodology: GDP from national accounts converted with PPP factors and deflated to a constant base year.

title: Unemployment rate
description: The share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment, expressed as a percentage.
methodology: Modeled estimates harmonized across national labor force surveys using ILO definitions.

title: Inflation, consumer prices
description: The annual percentage change in the cost to the average consumer of acquiring a fixed basket of goods and services.
methodology: Computed as the year-on-year change in the consumer price index reported by national statistical offices.

title: Access to safely managed drinking water
description: The percentage of the population using an improved drinking water source that is accessible on premises, available when needed, and free from contamination.
methodology: Estimated from household surveys and administrative data using the JMP service ladder.

title: Renewable energy share in total consumption
description: Renewable energy consumption as a percentage of total final energy consumption, including hydro, wind, solar, and biomass.
methodology: Derived from national energy balances, dividing renewable final consumption by total final consumption.
